name: rag-agent-prompt-workstation
description: RAG 智能体问答系统：把模糊提示词细化为可执行、可导出的规范提示词。

scripts.check: node --check server.js && node --check backend/orchestrator.js && node --check app.js && node --check scripts/extract-guideline-vocab.js && node --check scripts/clean-guideline-vocab.js && node --check scripts/evaluate-workflows.js && node --check scripts/run-ci-review.js && PYTHONPYCACHEPREFIX=.pycache python3 -m py_compile scripts/ingest_knowledge.py scripts/search_knowledge.py scripts/inspect_knowledge.py
scripts.review: npm run check && npm run eval:ci
